creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
I approve. Thanks!

Note that this PR makes this one obsolete (0.13.0):

   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150171

I'm not sure what happened to that one. I recently realized it was
still pending after I got an automated mailing saying I "might" not
have known about it, but turns out I did send in the approval.

-- 
/ Peter Schuller
